comment.body: I think you are on the right track with one last data remaining. If retail sales come in strong, market can rally back to 6300. Also Mag7 earnings are on deck in last two weeks of July. All of them are clever enough to report before new tariff deadline of August 1st. Guess CFOs in these companies want to not anger admin and also want to push tariff impact under carpet :). These are the only 2 positive tailwinds and if they are super supportive and powell does not get fired over next two weeks can rally back to 6300 and if not a big mean reversion play is coming up for August.
